R_ENCODER_DESCRIPTION: Rotary encoder control library based on PulseCounter
R_ENCODER_LABEL_SETUP: Setup (this is required to use other Rotary Encoder blocks)
R_ENCODER_CONSTRUCTOR_MESSAGE0:
create $[CONSTRUCTED_VAR_NAME] rotary encoder
 on level pin $[PIN_LEVEL] edge pin $[PIN_EDGE]
R_ENCODER_CONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create a new Rotary Encoder instance
R_ENCODER_READ_TOOLTIP: Read the current value of the rotary encoder
